claims.headline: Eases nerve-related discomfort
claims.notesSentence: Two-phase clinical study reported improvements in lumbar disc-associated radiculopathy with oral agmatine.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Agmatine lumbar radiculopathy study on PubMed

claims.headline: Modulates glutamate signaling
claims.notesSentence: Reviewed CNS pharmacology positions agmatine as an endogenous neuromodulator of glutamate-driven stress responses.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Agmatine glutamate neuromodulation review on PubMed
